config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmBaoCaoTienDoChuyenSonAdd
Nút WinForms gốc: Đồng ý · Thoát
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_BAOCAO_TIENDO_CHUYENSON_DELETE, TR_BAOCAO_TIENDO_CHUYENSON_GETALL, TR_BAOCAO_TIENDO_CHUYENSON_GETLIST, TR_BAOCAO_TIENDO_CHUYENSON_INSERT, TR_BAOCAO_TIENDO_CHUYENSON_UPDATE, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETBYMULTIPLEORDER, TR_ORDER_GET2, TR_ORDER_GETALL, TR_ORDER_GETALLBYCUSTOMER, TR_ORDER_GETBYSTATUS, TR_ORDER_GETCONTAINER, TR_ORDER_GETLIST, TR_ORDER_Get3
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_loaisp, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_detail, tr_order_replacement
